headline: Stop the weight gain, discipline starts today
summary: You've gained 0.4kg this week; today you must execute perfect portion control with Huel and log every kJ to reverse momentum.
details: Eat only pre-portioned Huel meals today—zero snacking, zero emotional eating—and track every kilojoule consumed. Hit the rowing machine for 45 minutes at moderate-to-high intensity to build your deficit. Today matters because you're trending up when you need -0.64 kg/week; establishing discipline now sets the pattern before weekend temptations arrive Friday.
